title: Graph Valid Tree
input_format: An integer `n` and an array of `edges`.
output_format: `true` if the edges make up a valid tree, `false` otherwise.
constraints:
- `1 <= n <= 2000`
- `0 <= edges.length <= 5000`
- `edges[i].length == 2`
- `0 <= ai, bi < n`
- `ai != bi`
- There are no self-loops or repeated edges.
function_signature: function validTree(n: number, edges: number[][]): boolean {}
